description_long: This ornate sconce features a central mounting base from which six elegantly curved arms radiate outward, each supporting a lampshade with a pleated texture. The arms and central column are adorned with intricate scrollwork and are festooned with numerous hanging crystal pendants, adding a luxurious and sparkling effect. The lampshades are semi-translucent, likely made of frosted or textured glass, diffusing the light softly. The overall structure is symmetrical, with each arm equally spaced around the central axis, and the decorative crystals are distributed evenly for visual balance. The finish appears to be a polished metal, possibly chrome or silver, which enhances the reflective quality of the fixture. This sconce is designed to be mounted on a ceiling, serving as a statement lighting piece in upscale urban interiors.
description: A luxurious, multi-arm ceiling sconce with pleated glass shades, ornate scrollwork, and hanging crystal pendants, finished in polished metal. Designed for elegant urban interiors.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all six lampshades, central column, and symmetrical arrangement of crystal pendants.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the arms, the layered scrollwork, and the distribution of crystals.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all lampshades and crystals visible, emphasizing the fixture's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the curvature of the arms and the ornate details from another perspective.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a vintage, baroque-inspired design with ornate scrollwork, pleated glass shades, and abundant crystal decorations, evoking a sense of opulence and classical elegance.
